seo.title: Acupuncture for Migraines — Natural Headache Relief
seo.description: Discover how acupuncture provides effective, drug-free relief for migraines and chronic headaches through natural pain management techniques.

title: Migraine Treatment with Acupuncture
intro: Migraines affect millions of people worldwide, causing debilitating pain, nausea, and sensitivity to light and sound. Acupuncture has been recognized by the WHO as an effective treatment for migraines and tension-type headaches.

sections.title: Acupuncture Approach to Migraines
sections.content: Acupuncture treats migraines by targeting specific points on the head, neck, and extremities that regulate blood flow and reduce nerve sensitivity. Treatment helps normalize serotonin levels, reduce inflammation of blood vessels, and decrease the frequency and intensity of migraine episodes.

sections.title: Benefits of Acupuncture for Migraines
items: Reduction in frequency and severity of attacks
Reduced neck and shoulder tension that triggers migraines
Long-lasting preventive effects with regular treatment

faq.q: How effective is acupuncture for migraines?
faq.a: Clinical studies show that regular acupuncture can reduce migraine frequency by 50% or more in many patients, with effects comparable to preventive medications but without side effects.

faq.q: Can acupuncture stop a migraine in progress?
faq.a: Yes, acupuncture can help relieve an active migraine, though preventive treatment between attacks is generally more effective for long-term management.
